/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -pthread -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/jumarker.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libjumarker.so -o libjumarker.so CMakeFiles/jumarker.dir/cameraparameters.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jumarker.dir/cvdrawingutils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jumarker.dir/marker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jumarker.dir/markerdetector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jumarker.dir/model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jumarker.dir/svgData.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jumarker.dir/basictypes/debug.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jumarker.dir/basictypes/io_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jumarker.dir/featureextractors/ORBextractor.cpp.o   -L/home/jayendra/cv-project/external/JuMarker/opencv_compat/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jayendra/cv-project/external/JuMarker/opencv_compat/lib /home/jayendra/cv-project/external/JuMarker/opencv_compat/lib/libopencv_core.so /home/jayendra/cv-project/external/JuMarker/opencv_compat/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so /home/jayendra/cv-project/external/JuMarker/opencv_compat/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so /home/jayendra/cv-project/external/JuMarker/opencv_compat/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so /home/jayendra/cv-project/external/JuMarker/opencv_compat/lib/libopencv_videoio.so /home/jayendra/cv-project/external/JuMarker/opencv_compat/lib/libopencv_highgui.so /home/jayendra/cv-project/external/JuMarker/opencv_compat/lib/libopencv_features2d.so /home/jayendra/cv-project/external/JuMarker/opencv_compat/lib/libopencv_video.so
